name: Remove gpg (prevents VS Code GPG-agent forwarding crash)
description: Uninstalls gnupg/gpg from the image after the other features have built. With no `gpg` binary present, VS Code skips forwarding the host gpg-agent and copying its keyring into the container on connect — a copy that otherwise crashes ("Aborted (core dumped)", exit 134) on hosts whose GnuPG keyring is empty or keybox-only. This project does not sign commits; apt still verifies packages via the separate `gpgv`. Ordered via installsAfter because the node/github-cli features need gpg at build time (gpg --recv-keys).
